project_name: Astra Clínica de Terapia Física y Espiritual
aesthetic: Editorial wellness luxury, refined healing space

fonts.name: Cormorant Garamond
fonts.usage: Headlines, Hero Text, Quotes, Stylized Numbers

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-texto
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight text-texto
hierarchy.caption: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans text-dim

buttons.primary: bg-dorado hover:bg-dorado2 text-blanco px-8 py-4 font-sans tracking-widest uppercase text-sm transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-dorado text-dorado hover:bg-arena px-8 py-4 font-sans tracking-widest uppercase text-sm transition-colors duration-300
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg z-50 transition-transform hover:scale-105

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-40 bg-blanco/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-arena3/50 transition-all duration-300
navigation.links: font-sans text-sm tracking-widest uppercase text-medio hover:text-dorado transition-colors

cards.service: bg-arena2 border border-arena3 group cursor-pointer hover:bg-arena transition-colors duration-500 flex flex-col justify-between h-full p-8 relative overflow-hidden
cards.testimonial: bg-oscuro border border-medio/30 p-8 min-w-[300px] md:min-w-[400px] snap-center shrink-0

heroes.home_crossfade: Relative h-screen w-full overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center. Needs an absolute overlay of bg-oscuro/40 to ensure h1 is readable. Use Framer Motion or React state + CSS opacity transition for background image crossfading.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle color shifts, slight transforms on image hover (scale 1.05 inside overflow-hidden wrapper)
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in on route change using Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0, duration 0.6)
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Elements should gently fade and drift up on scroll using Intersection Observer or Framer Motion 'whileInView'
motion_and_interactions.route_handling: MUST implement <ScrollToTop /> component in React Router to ensure pages start at top on navigation.

pages_and_routes.name: Reservaciones
sections: Form (Name, Service, Date, redirect to WhatsApp onClick with pre-filled message via wa.me link)

pages_and_routes.name: Nosotros
sections: Values (Editorial layout using Roman Numerals i.e. I, II, III using text-dorado3)

services.name: Consulta de valoración en terapia física
Masaje relajante espalda, hombros y cuello
Experiencia completa de hielo, respiración y yoga

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and major links MUST use 'data-testid' for robust testing (e.g., data-testid='nav-services-link', data-testid='whatsapp-fab', data-testid='reserve-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON data. Do not invent your own colors or typography.
Initialize React Router v6 with 4 routes (Home, Servicios, Reservaciones, Nosotros).
Ensure <ScrollToTop /> runs on every route change.
Implement the theme colors directly into tailwind.config.js.
Implement the two fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost) in the global CSS and tailwind config.
Build the hero slider in Home using Framer Motion with the provided 'hero_bg' images.
Ensure the layout feels 'empty' and breathable. Use generous padding like py-24, py-32. Tension is created by empty space.
For the 'Reservaciones' form, write an onSubmit handler that prevents default and calls window.open('https://wa.me/1234567890?text=Hola...', '_blank').
Remember to build for React JS (not TSX), ensuring file extensions are .jsx or .js as needed in your environment.
Include 'data-testid' tags on all CTA buttons, navigation items, and form elements.
Do NOT use generic stock images outside of the provided media object.
